name: user_prefer
description: Personal info, dialogue preferences, project-related preferences

name: project_info
description: Technology stack, project configuration, environment setup

name: project_specification
description: Development standards, architecture specs, design standards

name: experience_lessons
description: Pain points to avoid, best practices, tool usage optimization

name: workspace
description: Project-specific information

name: global
description: Information applicable across all projects

name: attached_files
description: Complete file content selected by user

name: selected_codes
description: Code snippets highlighted by user (treat as highly relevant)

name: git_commits
description: Historical commit messages and changes

name: code_change
description: Currently staged git changes

name: other_context
description: Additional relevant information

name: search_codebase
description: Search codebase with symbol search (for specific identifiers) or semantic search (for functionality descriptions)

name: grep_code
description: Search file contents using regular expressions

name: search_file
description: Search for files by glob pattern

name: list_dir
description: List directory contents

name: read_file
description: Read file contents with optional dependency viewing

name: create_file
description: Create new files (limited to 600 lines)

name: search_replace
description: Make precise string replacements in existing files

name: edit_file
description: Propose edits to existing files

name: delete_file
description: Safely delete files

name: run_in_terminal
description: Execute shell commands

name: get_terminal_output
description: Get output from background terminal processes

name: get_problems
description: Get compile/lint errors in code files

name: add_tasks
description: Add new tasks to task list

name: update_tasks
description: Update task properties and status

name: update_memory
description: Store/update/delete knowledge and lessons learned

name: search_memory
description: Search and retrieve codebase memory and knowledge

name: fetch_content
description: Fetch content from web pages

name: search_web
description: Search the web for real-time information

name: run_preview
description: Set up preview browser for web servers

name: fetch_rules
description: Query detailed content of specific rules
